com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseRequest<PaymentRequest>
      • com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public class PaymentRequest
extends BaseRequest<PaymentRequest>
    To set payment transaction request properties
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String Amount
      The base amount, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the transaction is LOYALTY, this field is the points, if this field is NULL, terminal will prompt dialog to enter the amount.
      If the terminal is under demo mode, running transactions with special amount will trigger special results.
      Please refer to Special Amount in Demo Mode for more details.
      java.lang.String AuthCode
      Voice Authorization Code obtained via telephone from the payment host.
      PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo AutoRentalInfo
      Auto Rental information.
      java.lang.String AutoSubmit
      Deprecated.  
      java.lang.String CashBackAmt
      The cash back amount, $$$$$$$CC, if the field is NULL, and the switch on terminal turn on, terminal will prompt dialog to enter it.
      java.lang.String ClerkID
      Employee/clerk id.
      PaymentRequest.CommercialCard CommercialCard
      Commercial Information.
      java.lang.String ContinuousScreen
      ‘0’ default.
      java.lang.String CVVBypassReason
      The reason the CVV or Gift Card PIN was not provided.
      java.lang.String ECRRefNum
      The ECR reference number, This is an unique code in ECR side.
      java.lang.String ECRTransID
      ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side.
      java.lang.String ExtData
      Extended data in XML format
      FleetCardRequest FleetCard
      FleetCard Information.
      java.lang.String FuelAmt
      The portion of the transaction amount charged for fuel purchases during fleet transactions.
      java.lang.String GiftCardType
      The Gift card type.
      java.lang.String GiftTenderType
      The tender type of the account used to activate or reload the gift card.

      Host Credential Information see PaymentRequest.HostCredentialInformation for detail.

    • Field Detail

      • TenderType

        public int TenderType
        Indicate the Tender type.

        ALL = 0
        CREDIT = 1
        DEBIT = 2
        CHECK = 3
        EBT_FOODSTAMP = 4
        EBT_CASHBENEFIT = 5
        GIFT = 6
        LOYALTY = 7
        CASH = 8
        EBT = 9
        CHECKCARDTYPE = 10 (Deprecated since V1.13.00)
        QR_PAYMENT = 11
        PRE_INPUT_ACCOUNT = 12
        An Error will be return while invoking POSLink.ProcessTrans if user set other value.
        User can assign the TenderType by com.PAX.POSLink.PaymentRequest.ParseTenderType or assign an integer directly.
        Example: PaymentRequest payment = new PaymentRequest();
        payment.TenderType = payment.ParseTenderType("CREDIT"); //recommend
        or
        payment.TenderType = 1;
        Note:The Do Credit command is used to execute the credit payment transactions when Auto EDC mode is disabled and will use the credit transaction flow. When Auto EDC is enabled, this command will be executed as do payment without specifying the EDC type, the EDC will be processed based on the card type.

      • TransType

        public int TransType
        Indicate the transaction type. An Error will be returned while invoking POSLink.ProcessTrans if user set other value.
        User can assign the TransType by com.PAX.POSLink.PaymentRequest.ParseTransType or assign an integer directly.
        Example:
        PaymentRequest payment = new PaymentRequest();
        payment.TransType = payment.ParseTransType("SALE"); //recommend
        or
        payment.TransType = 1;

        CHECKCARDTYPE(Deprecated since V1.13.00) only support SALE now.

        See PaymentTransType for definition.

        See EDC Supported Trans Type for more detail.

      • Amount

        public java.lang.String Amount
        The base amount, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the transaction is LOYALTY, this field is the points, if this field is NULL, terminal will prompt dialog to enter the amount.
        If the terminal is under demo mode, running transactions with special amount will trigger special results.
        Please refer to Special Amount in Demo Mode for more details.

        Attribute: n…9

      • CashBackAmt

        public java.lang.String CashBackAmt
        The cash back amount, $$$$$$$CC, if the field is NULL, and the switch on terminal turn on, terminal will prompt dialog to enter it.

        Attribute: n…9

      • ClerkID

        public java.lang.String ClerkID
        Employee/clerk id.

        Attribute: ans…8

      • Zip

        public java.lang.String Zip
        Cardholder/check owner billing zip/postal code.

        Attribute: ans…9

      • TipAmt

        public java.lang.String TipAmt
        Tip amount $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n…9

      • TaxAmt

        public java.lang.String TaxAmt
        The tax amount, $$$$$$$CC.
        if the field is NULL, and terminal supports commercial card, terminal will prompt dialog to enter it. it included in transaction amount.

        Attribute: n…9

      • Street

        public java.lang.String Street
        Primary billing street address.

        Attribute: ans…32

      • Street2

        public java.lang.String Street2
        Backup billing street address.

        Attribute: ans…32

      • SurchargeAmt

        public java.lang.String SurchargeAmt
        The merchant surcharge fee, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n…9

        If the setting in terminal of "merchant fee" is 0, this field must be NULL or 0.
        If the setting in terminal of "merchant fee" is not 0, this field can be exist or NULL, if the value is NULL, terminal will use the default value in terminal.
        Only debit sale and ebt cash benefit sale support it.

      • ServerID

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String ServerID
        Deprecated. 
        Server identify .

      • AutoSubmit

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String AutoSubmit
        Deprecated. 
        True = on, False = off, anything else = use default setting .

      • PONum

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String PONum
        Deprecated. (deprecated since V1.02.00). Please use PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.PONumber

        Attribute: ans…25

        The order number supplied by the merchant.

      • InvNum

        public java.lang.String InvNum
        POS system invoice/tracking number.

        Attribute: ans…16

      • ECRRefNum

        public java.lang.String ECRRefNum
        The ECR reference number, This is an unique code in ECR side.

        Attribute: ans…16

      • ECRTransID

        public java.lang.String ECRTransID
        ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side. Please check Host Specific Remarks for details about field attributes.

        Attribute: ans..64

      • OrigECRRefNum

        public java.lang.String OrigECRRefNum
        The original ECR reference number, This is an unique code in ECR side.

        Attribute: n..16

      • AuthCode

        public java.lang.String AuthCode
        Voice Authorization Code obtained via telephone from the payment host. The transaction type is “FORCED” or “FORCED PRE-AUTH”. This field is NULL and the terminal will prompt for the authorization.

        Attribute: n..10

      • ExtData

        public java.lang.String ExtData
        Extended data in XML format

        Example:<TagName>x</TagName>

        Note: refer to XML restriction, the below characters need to escape at first to avoid exception. ‘, “, <, >, &. Should escape as these &quot;, &apos;, &lt;, &gt;, &amp;.

        See PaymentRequest ExtData for definition.

      • FuelAmt

        public java.lang.String FuelAmt
        The portion of the transaction amount charged for fuel purchases during fleet transactions.
        This amount is pre-included in the transaction base amount.

        Attribute: n…9

      • ContinuousScreen

        public java.lang.String ContinuousScreen
        ‘0’ default.
        ‘1’ after command is executed display doesn't go back to idle screen.

        Attribute: n1

      • ServiceFee

        public java.lang.String ServiceFee
        Service Fee for Credit and Debit transactions, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n..9

      • GiftCardType

        public java.lang.String GiftCardType
        The Gift card type.

        Values:
        C - Custom Value Gift Card
        P - Predetermine Value Gift Card
        Applicable for T06 only.

        Attribute: a1

      • CVVBypassReason

        public java.lang.String CVVBypassReason
        The reason the CVV or Gift Card PIN was not provided.

        0: Deliberately Bypassed
        1: Not Available
        2: Illegible

        Attribute: n1

        Since:
        V1.09.00

      • GiftTenderType

        public java.lang.String GiftTenderType
        The tender type of the account used to activate or reload the gift card.

        0 = Unknown
        1 = Credit Card
        2 = Debit Card
        3 = Check
        4 = Cash

        Attribute: n1

        Since:
        V1.10.00

        public java.lang.String OrigTraceNum
        Original trace number which is returned in response host information.

    • Constructor Detail

      • PaymentRequest

        public PaymentRequest()

    • Method Detail

      • ParseTenderType

        public int ParseTenderType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String Tender type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "ALL","CREDIT","DEBIT","CHECK","EBT_FOODSTAMP","EBT_CASHBENEFIT","GIFT","LOYALTY","CASH", "EBT", "CHECKCARDTYPE"(Deprecated since VV1.13.00), "DOQRPAYMENT", "PREINPUTACCOUNT"
        Returns:
        an integer identify the Tender Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • ParseTransType

        public int ParseTransType(java.lang.String type)
        parse the String transaction type to integer type.
        Parameters:
        type - could be "UNKNOWN", "AUTH", "SALE", "RETURN", "VOID", "POSTAUTH", "FORCEAUTH", "CAPTURE", "REPEATSALE", "CAPTUREALL", "ADJUST", "INQUIRY", "ACTIVATE", "DEACTIVATE", "RELOAD", "VOID SALE", "VOID RETURN", "VOID AUTH", "VOID POSTAUTH", "VOID FORCEAUTH", "VOID WITHDRAWAL", "REVERSAL", "WITHDRAWAL", "ISSUE", "CASHOUT", "REPLACE", "MERGE", "REPORTLOST", "REDEEM", "STATUS_CHECK", "SETUP", "INIT", "VERIFY" "REACTIVATE" "FORCED ISSUE" "FORCED ADD" "UNLOAD" "RENEW" "TOKENIZE" "GETCONVERTDETAIL" "CONVERT" "INCREMENTALAUTH" "BALANCEWITHLOCK" "REDEMPTIONWITHUNLOCK" "REENTER" "TRANSACTION ADJUSTMENT" "TRANSFER" "FINALIZE" "DEPOSIT" "ACCOUNT PAYMENT" "FORCED PREAUTH" "VOID FORCED PREAUTH" "IDENTIFY"
        Returns:
        an integer identify the transaction Type, or -1 if parse error.

      • pack

        protected PaymentRequest pack()
        Specified by:
        pack in class BaseRequest<PaymentRequest>
